# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: https://www.googleapis.com/clouddeploy/v1/projects/dm-templates/global/DeploymentManager/v1
  name: deploymentmanager.py

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true

- name: app-firewall-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    targetTags:
    - app-ssh

- name: app-firewall-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
    targetTags:
    - app-http

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
        - app-http
        - app-ssh
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y nginx
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl start nginx

- name: app-managed-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    baseInstanceName: app-vm
    targetSize: 2
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 80

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-managed-instance-group.instanceGroup)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-target-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-target-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: "80"

- name: app-sql-network
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - value: 0.0.0.0/0
          name: all
    rootPassword: changeme123!

- name: app-sql-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-network.name)
    name: appdb

- name: app-sql-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-network.name)
    name: appuser
    password: appuserpassword

- name: app-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: app-storage-$(env["deployment"])
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true

outputs:
- name: loadBalancerIP
  value: $(ref.app-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
- name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-sql-network.connectionName)
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.name)
